---
name: Bug report
about: Report a CharacterSkinManager compatibility issue
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Game Version

Example: `v0.108.0`

## Mod Version

Example: `v0.0.3+sts2.0.108.0.1`

## What Happened

Describe what you clicked and what failed.

## Logs

Paste the relevant lines from:

```text
C:\Users\<you>\AppData\Roaming\SlayTheSpire2\logs
```

Look especially for `CharacterSkinManager`, `MissingMethodException`, `MissingFieldException`, `TypeLoadException`, and Harmony patch failures.

## Other Mods

List other enabled mods.
